title: Citrusy Chewy Italian Cheese Pasta
description: A romantic Piedmontese dish featuring a citrusy twist on traditional Italian cheese pasta, with a chewy texture and no onions or garlic. Perfect for a cozy dinner with loved ones.

ingredients.name: Cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: Sashimi-cut, so cut thinly against the grain.

instructions: Cook the penne pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the lemon zest and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the lemon juice and butter to the skillet and stir to combine. Bring to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly thickened.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the citrus butter sauce. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with the chopped parsley. Serve immediately.
Garnish with additional lemon zest if desired, for extra citrus flavor.
